# OneSchema vs Dromo: Honest Comparison [2026]

## Summary
A 2026 head-to-head comparison between OneSchema and Dromo for managed CSV/spreadsheet importer components. Dromo positions itself as having superior ease-of-use and transparent pricing, while OneSchema differentiates on error resolution UX (bulk row deletion, error filtering) and AI-powered column matching.

## Key quotations / statistics
- "OneSchema excels in error resolution UX with bulk row deletion and error filtering capabilities"
- "Dromo's Schema Studio allows non-technical team members to configure import schemas without developer involvement"
- "Dromo offers client-side-only data processing (Private Mode) where files never leave the browser - important for HIPAA, GDPR, and CCPA compliance"
- "OneSchema requires a sales call with no publicly listed pricing"
- "Flatfile uses opaque dual-metric pricing (per file and per record), potentially reaching $500,000+ annually at scale"

## Annotations for weapon-forge
- This is the primary source for `guides/02-column-mapping-ux.md` managed importer comparison section
- The privacy/data-handling distinction is critical: Dromo = client-side only; OneSchema and Flatfile = server-side processing
- The pricing transparency finding directly addresses Command Brief open question Q3
- Dromo Schema Studio (no-code configuration) is a notable UX differentiator worth highlighting
